name: laabu-kiq-orchestrator-hub
description: Central routing hub for all Knowledge IQ operations. Intelligently routes document upload and ingestion requests to the Document Intelligence agent, and knowledge search queries to the Enterprise Search agent. External agents and systems should call this hub as the single entry point for all knowledge-base interactions.

skills.name: Route Document Upload
skills.description: Accepts a document upload request from any agent or system and routes it to the Document Intelligence agent for AI analysis, scope confirmation, and RAG ingestion with full metadata tagging.

input.document_content: The document text, Drive URL, or GCS URI
input.source_agent: Name of the agent requesting the upload (e.g. crm_agent, ops_iq)
input.context: Any additional context about the document or its intended audience

output.result: Upload confirmation with applied metadata tags and accessibility scope

examples: Upload this sales contract to the knowledge base — from crm_agent
Index this technical specification for the engineering team
Store this meeting summary in the knowledge base

skills.name: Route Knowledge Search
skills.description: Routes any knowledge query to the Enterprise Search agent, which searches across all connected enterprise data sources and returns answers with citations.

input.query: The knowledge question, search request, or research topic

output.result: Grounded answer with source citations from enterprise data sources

examples: What is our remote work policy?
Search for documentation on the payments API
Who is the point of contact for vendor contracts?
